name: Change Data Capture — YugabyteDB → PostgreSQL via Debezium
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client && bash .devcontainer/scripts/setup-cdc-ybdb-pg.sh && echo "✅ CDC exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-cdc-ybdb-pg.sh && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → cdc-demo   (guided CDC demo script)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → cdc-ws     (Workshop shell for manual commands)"'
